title: SKT's Better Fast Leaves
description: make leaves in fast graphic setting looks better, also work on fancy graphic
body: ![Pale Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9ff00f24305a2b187ef058262e8b861ae69f2e1.jpeg) ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cc66fd781147a77844bb92bec1cd01c71015ad3.jpeg) ### 📖⠄Description Simple resource pack that make leaves in fast graphic settings looks better, also work with fancy graphic settings. Also available for mcpe, Download on [MCPEDL](https://mcpedl.com/skt-bfl-be/) or [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/texture-packs/skt-bfl-be). ### 🖼️⠄Ingame Screenshot ![With RP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c02e744e7bcbe3615b4277dcbfdf899817d9aa51.jpeg)![Without RP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d3fa8a02cd8f9572f92d4207a383fd89c79899d.jpeg) ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cc66fd781147a77844bb92bec1cd01c71015ad3.jpeg) ### 👋🏼⠄Follow Me
